name: Build agent via full wizard bridge
name_fa: ساخت ایجنت از طریق ویزارد کامل
description: Walk all wizard steps from the create page through to test start using the wizard.create bridge, then continue testing.

steps.label: پیمایش همه مراحل ویزارد تا شروع تست
آموزش تعاملی، طراحی پنل و تأیید

content_md: From the /agents/create page with a name present, run the wizard.create bridge to walk all steps to test start, wait for the slug query param, then continue testing.
